channel.title: FiveToFifteen
channel.description: New stories, challenge pages, competitions, and exam practice from FiveToFifteen.

item.title: Addition Tables Hub | FiveToFifteen
item.description: One hub page for all addition-table stories from 1 to 10.

item.title: Multiplication Tables Hub | FiveToFifteen
item.description: One hub page for all multiplication-table stories from 1 to 10.

item.title: Three-Digit Addition Adventure! ➕
item.description: Learn three-digit addition with kid-friendly methods, worked examples, final quiz, and certificate.

item.title: Two Number Addition Adventure! ➕
item.description: Learn two-number addition with kid-friendly methods, worked examples, final quiz, and certificate.

item.title: Two and Three Number Addition Practice Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet to practise two-number and three-digit addition using facts, make-10, tens and ones, carrying, and word problems.

item.title: Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable early maths worksheets for addition, subtraction, number bonds, missing numbers, and more.

item.title: Addition Table Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition table worksheets with table completion, cut and match, revision, and final tests.

item.title: Alphabet Worksheets A-Z | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable alphabet worksheets from A to Z for early learners.

item.title: Clock and Time Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable clock and time worksheets for drawing hands, writing times, matching clocks, sorting morning and afternoon, and routine timelines.

item.title: Multiplication Worksheets | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable multiplication worksheets for table practice, skip counting, repeated addition, missing factors, word problems, table mazes, and mixed challenges.

item.title: Color the Answers Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition worksheet where children colour target answers.

item.title: Complete the Table Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition table worksheet for completing missing sums.

item.title: Cut and Match Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable cut and match addition table worksheet.

item.title: Addition Facts Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition facts worksheet for early maths practice.

item.title: Final Test Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable final test sheet for addition tables.

item.title: Mixed Revision Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable mixed revision worksheet for addition tables.

item.title: Multiple Choice Facts Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable multiple-choice addition facts worksheet.

item.title: Speed Practice Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable addition speed practice worksheet.

item.title: Addition with 1 Worksheet Sample | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable sample worksheet for learning addition with 1.

item.title: Letter A Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter A.

item.title: Letter B Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter B.

item.title: Letter C Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter C.

item.title: Letter D Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter D.

item.title: Letter E Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter E.

item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter F.

item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter G.

item.title: Letter H Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter H.

item.title: Letter I Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter I.

item.title: Letter J Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter J.

item.title: Letter K Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter K.

item.title: Letter L Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter L.

item.title: Letter M Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter M.

item.title: Letter N Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter N.

item.title: Letter O Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter O.

item.title: Letter P Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter P.

item.title: Letter Q Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter Q.

item.title: Letter R Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter R.

item.title: Letter S Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter S.

item.title: Letter T Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter T.

item.title: Letter U Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter U.

item.title: Letter V Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter V.

item.title: Letter W Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter W.

item.title: Letter X Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter X.

item.title: Letter Y Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter Y.

item.title: Letter Z Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for learning the letter Z.

item.title: Before After Between Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable before after between worksheet for early maths practice.

item.title: Daily Routine Timeline Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable daily routine timeline worksheet with time labels and sequence practice.

item.title: Draw Hands on the Clock Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for drawing hour and minute hands on clock faces.

item.title: Elapsed Time Basics Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for basic elapsed time practice using half hours and full hours.

item.title: Match Analog to Digital Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for matching analog clocks to digital time labels.

item.title: Morning and Afternoon Sorting Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for sorting daily activities into morning and afternoon.

item.title: Write the Time Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for reading analog clocks and writing the time.

item.title: Compare Bigger Smaller Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable compare bigger smaller worksheet for early maths practice.

item.title: Count and Circle Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable count and circle worksheet for early maths practice.

item.title: Missing Number Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable missing number worksheet for early maths practice.

item.title: Missing Factor Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for finding missing factors in multiplication facts.

item.title: Mixed Times-Table Challenge Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable mixed multiplication challenge worksheet.

item.title: Repeated Addition to Multiplication Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for converting repeated addition into multiplication.

item.title: Skip Counting Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable worksheet for skip counting as a multiplication strategy.

item.title: Multiplication Table Maze Worksheet | FiveToFifteen
item.description: Printable multiplication maze worksheet using correct table answers.
